prompt: What is the average exam score for each course?

inputData.question: What is the average exam score for each course?

response.bodyRaw: {"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average exam score for each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average exam score for each course?"},"startedAt":1771855313639,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average exam score for each course. I need to join the grades table (which contains exam_score) with enrollments and course_sections to get the course information. The path is: grades → enrollments → course_sections → courses. I'll group by course and calculate the average of exam_score, filtering out NULL values.","sql":"SELECT c.id, c.code, c.name, AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score FROM courses c JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name ORDER BY c.code","assumptions":["Exam scores are stored in the grades.exam_score column","NULL exam scores should be excluded from the average calculation","Results are grouped by course and ordered by course code for deterministic output"]},"endedAt":1771855327722},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT c.id, c.code, c.name, AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score FROM courses c JOIN resultRaw.sql: SELECT c.id, c.code, c.name, AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score FROM courses c JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name ORDER BY c.code

result.sql: SELECT c.id, c.code, c.name, AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score FROM courses c JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name ORDER BY c.code
